Metadata.title: Goalkeeper Academy
Metadata.description: Goalkeeper academy in the Chablais Valais region. Specialized training for young goalkeepers aged 6 to 18.

Footer.tagline: The goalkeeper academy of the Chablais Valais region. Specialized training for young goalkeepers aged 6 to 18.

HomePage.title: Training tomorrow's goalkeepers
HomePage.subtitle: The goalkeeper academy of the Chablais Valais region. Bilingual routing is now in place — public pages are coming in phase 3.

preview.title: Design system building blocks
preview.subtitle: Buttons, badges, cards — the visual foundation shared across every page.

kids.title: Kids programs
kids.content: 1 to 2 sessions per week, individual coaching, gear included.

camps.title: Holiday camps
camps.content: Skill-building camps by age group, half-day or full-day formats.

clubs.title: Club contracts
clubs.content: We come to your club to train every goalkeeper across all teams.
